about.title: Hi, I'm Nimuthu
about.intro1: Final Year Computer Science Undergraduate (Cybersecurity Major) @ Edith Cowan University, Sri Lanka.
about.intro2: Aspiring Cybersecurity Analyst & SOC Engineer @ MillenniumIT ESP. Passionate about threat detection, network security, and ethical hacking — with a goal to work in Japan.
about.bullet1: Foundation in software development, mobile app security & network protocols.
about.bullet2: Experience with Flutter, Python, Dart, MATLAB, Android Studio.
about.bullet3: Focus on security, performance, UX; debugging & cross-platform troubleshooting.
about.securityText: Kali Linux, Wireshark, Nmap, Metasploit, Splunk
about.sysadminText: Linux/Windows Admin, iptables, MS SQL, Cisco Packet Tracer
about.aiText: Exploring AI-powered security tooling & automation scripts.
about.edu1: Edith Cowan University – BSc Computer Science (Cybersecurity), 3rd Year
about.edu2: Edith Cowan College – Diploma in Computer Science
about.edu3: Australian College of Business and Technology – Foundation of Computing
about.edu4: Lyceum International School – Cambridge A-Level & O-Level
about.learning2: AI in cybersecurity & secure app architecture
about.goal4: Build internship-ready portfolio with security edge
about.skillsText: Mobile App Security, Debugging & Troubleshooting, Secure Coding, CI/CD, AI Security Tools, Network Protocols, Documentation
about.interest1: 🌍 Love traveling and exploring new cultures and places.
about.interest2: 📚 Passionate about historical research – studying world history outside of my course just because I find it fascinating.
about.interest3: 🎮 Avid gamer: Playing Genshin Impact, Wuthering Waves, Zenless Zone Zero, and Honkai Star Rail.
about.interest4: 🎶 Fan of VTuber music, Japanese & Korean tracks.
about.interest5: 📺 Watching Solo Leveling & revisiting anime classics.
about.interest6: 🌏 From Sri Lanka → aspiring journey to Japan, blending tech & culture.
about.noteText: This page mirrors README content. For full CV details from the provided PDF, please supply the raw text so it can be integrated structurally into the site data model (education history, achievements, etc.).

profile.name: Nimuthu Ganegoda
profile.title: Final Year BSc Computer Science (Cybersecurity) | Aspiring Cybersecurity Analyst
profile.summary: I am a final-year Bachelor of Computer Science undergraduate majoring in Cybersecurity at Edith Cowan University (Sri Lanka campus), with a strong interest in digital security, threat analysis, and ethical hacking. My academic and personal pursuits reflect a deep commitment to understanding the evolving landscape of cyber threats and digital risk management. I am currently applying my knowledge in real-world contexts through an internship at MillenniumIT ESP as a Managed Security Services Engineer, focusing on network security, vulnerability assessment, and secure system design. I plan to pursue postgraduate studies in cybersecurity, with long-term aspirations to contribute to international security environments.
